briefdescription.para: SldState variable maintains the current secure lockdown state.
TamperResponse variable stores the tamper response configuration.
TamperTask is the task node pointer for tamper response processing.
This is the handler for tamper interrupt.

inbodydescription.para: Once the interrupt is received, PLM disables the interrupt and calls the handler. So it is necessary to re-enable the interrupt.

briefdescription.para: This function processes the tamper response.

listitem.para: No status return, waits forever for ROM to complete secure lockdown.

inbodydescription.para: Trigger FW CR error by setting CR_Flag in FW_ERR register
Configure TAMPER_RESP_0 with the received response
Trigger software tamper event to ROM to execute lockdown for PMC
Wait forever; ROM to complete secure lockdown

briefdescription.para: This function returns Secure Lockdown State.
This functions Triggers Tamper Response processing immediately or as a task.

parameterdescription.para: is the Tamper Response that has to occur
denotes whether processing has to occur immediately or as a task. The possible values are: XPLMI_TRIGGER_TAMPER_TASK, XPLMI_TRIGGER_TAMPER_IMMEDIATE.

inbodydescription.para: If Tamper Task is already triggered, Do nothing
For versal SSIT devices, Notify slave SLRs about SLD

briefdescription.para: This function registers the handler for tamper interrupt.

inbodydescription.para: Enable tamper interrupt in PMC GLOBAL

briefdescription.para: This function triggers secure lockdown if haltboot efuses are programmed.

parameterdescription.para:
denotes whether processing has to occur immediately or as a task. The possible values are:
XPLMI_TRIGGER_TAMPER_TASK,

briefdescription.para: This file contains the tamper response processing routines.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ma 07/08/2022 Initial release ma 07/19/2022 Disable interrupts before calling secure lockdown proc and continue secure lockdown irrespective of the status kpt 07/21/2022 Added XPlmi_IfHaltBootTriggerSLD ma 07/25/2022 Enhancements to secure lockdown code 1.01 ng 11/11/2022 Updated doxygen comments bm 01/03/2023 Create Secure Lockdown as a Critical Priority Task bm 01/03/2023 Notify Other SLRs about Secure Lockdown 1.02 skd 04/10/2023 Fix third party review comments 1.03 sk 07/18/2023 Added NULL check in RegisterTamperIntrHandler sk 08/17/2023 Updated XPlmi_EmSetAction arguments dd 09/12/2023 MISRA-C violation Rule 17.7 fixed 1.04 ma 10/10/2023 Added redundancy to TAMPER_RESP_0 and TAMPER_TRIG writes mss 10/31/2023 Added code to Trigger FW CR error in XPlmi_ProcessTamperResponse 2.00 ng 12/27/2023 Reduced log level for less frequent prints pre 05/05/2025 Clearing SSS configuration before handing off to ROM to trigger secure lockdown 2.4 abh 12/24/2025 Fixed MISRA-C Violations
